===Broadcast Talent=== {{BroadcasterCard |b1=Lucif3r |b2=Gamezotech |b3=NekRoz |b4=Captain Price |b5=RA1 }} ===Format=== * '''Quarter Finals:''''' March 20th - 23rd, 2024 ** 32 teams , 4 matchdays. *** 10 invited teams. *** 22 qualified teams. ** Round-robin format; Teams are divided into 4 groups of 8. ** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 16 teams}} qualify for ''Semi Finals''. ** {{bgcolortext|stayup|Bottom 16 teams}} advance to ''Lower Bracket''. * '''Lower Bracket:''''' March 24th 2024 ** 16 teams , 6 matches. ** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 8 teams}} qualify for ''Semi Finals''. ** {{bgcolortext|down|Bottom 8 teams}} are eliminated. * '''Semi Finals:''''' March 26th - 29th, 2024 ** 24 teams , 4 matchdays ** Round-robin format; Teams are divided into 3 groups of 8. ** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 16 teams}} qualify for ''Grand Finals''. * '''Grand Finals:''''' March 30th - 31st, April 2nd - 3rd, 2024 ** 16 teams , 4 matchdays ** 24 matches (6 each day). ==Prize Pool==
